tools.name: get_fuel_prices
tools.description: Current retail fuel prices (gasoline, diesel, LPG, CNG) for 125+ countries. Pass country_code to get one country in detail; omit it for a summary list.

tools.name: compare_fuel_prices
tools.description: Compare current prices for one fuel type across 2-10 countries. Returns sorted table cheapest-first.

tools.name: find_cheapest_fuel
tools.description: Find the cheapest countries for a given fuel type in a region (or worldwide). Useful for route planning.

tools.name: get_vansky_weather
tools.description: Get VanSky vanlife weather suitability score (0-100) for a country: van_score, sleep_score, solar yield, driving conditions, awning safety, condensation risk, 7-day forecast.

tools.name: list_vansky_top
tools.description: List the top N countries with the highest VanSky van-travel suitability score today.

tools.name: list_events
tools.description: List vanlife events: expos (Caravan Salon), festivals, meetups, forums, road trips. Filter by status, type, country, or free-text search.

tools.name: get_event
tools.description: Get full details for a single vanlife event by its slug.

tools.name: search_stories
tools.description: Search aggregated vanlife news stories (7 languages, 400+ sources). Filter by search query, category, country, locale.

tools.name: compare_vanbasket
tools.description: Compare food price index between two countries (world average = 100). Higher number = more expensive food.

tools.name: get_vanbasket
tools.description: Get VanBasket food price index details for one country.

tools.name: get_currency_rate
tools.description: Convert an amount between two currencies using live rates (150+ currencies, daily updates).
